task_description: Write a technical specification for a role-based access control (RBAC) system with support for hierarchical permissions, resource-level policies, and audit logging.

input_data.context: The application currently uses a simple user/admin boolean flag. As the product scales to support enterprise customers, a proper RBAC system is needed with organization-level roles, team-level roles, and resource-level permissions. Must integrate with existing JWT-based authentication.

constraints.tech_stack: Node.js/Express backend, PostgreSQL, Redis for caching
constraints.scale: 10K organizations, 500K users, permission checks on every API call
constraints.latency_requirement: Permission evaluation under 5ms using cached policies
